instruction: Merge near-synonymous Chinese concept candidates, choose one readable label, keep only the strongest Dishu image targets, and write concise explanations plus possible misreadings. Return JSON with concept_id, label, synonyms, semantic_tags, explanation, possible_misreadings, and selected_target_ids.
